title: 22.7 — Circular dependency issues with std::shared_ptr, and std::weak_ptr

content.code:
Lucy created
Ricky created
Lucy is now partnered with Ricky

Lucy created
Ricky created
Lucy is now partnered with Ricky
Ricky destroyed
Lucy destroyed

Lucy created
Ricky created
Lucy is now partnered with Ricky
Ricky's partner is: Lucy
Ricky destroyed
Lucy destroyed

Resource acquired
Resource destroyed
Our dumb ptr is: non-null
Resource acquired
Resource destroyed
Our weak ptr is: expired

list: Fix the program presented in the section “A reductive case” so that the Resource is properly deallocated. Do not alter the code inmain().
